{{Quote|To the strongest of us, glory in the kill!|Par Drann during the [[Battle of ILC-905]]|<ref name="Tyrant's Test">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>}}
'''Par Drann''' was a [[Yevetha]] and also the [[Primate/Legends|Primate]] of the [[Aramadia-class thrustship|thrustship]] ''[[Tholos]]'' during the [[Battle of ILC-905]]. He failed to protect the installation and [[Death/Legends|died]] in combat with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
